description: Post-v7 code quality: split oversized frontend components and backend functions to meet 300-line/40-line limits, fix layer violations (direct api/ imports in components), improve extension error handling, and accessibility fixes.

userStories.title: Split ManualAddForm.jsx (294 lines, longest function 266 lines)
userStories.description: ManualAddForm.jsx is 294 lines with its main function body spanning 266 lines. Extract form field groups into sub-components (e.g., ManualAddFormFields.jsx, ManualAddFormActions.jsx) and move validation logic to a useManualAddForm hook. The parent component should orchestrate but not contain all markup.
acceptanceCriteria: ManualAddForm.jsx is under 300 lines
No single function exceeds 40 lines in any extracted file
All existing ManualAddForm tests pass without modification
npm run build succeeds with no errors
npm test passes all 427+ tests
userStories.notes: Largest function in the entire frontend codebase.

userStories.title: Split ApplicationList.jsx (287 lines, longest function 252 lines)
userStories.description: ApplicationList.jsx is 287 lines with a 252-line function body. Extract the table header, row rendering, and bulk action bar into sub-components. Keep the data-fetching hook usage in the parent.
acceptanceCriteria: ApplicationList.jsx is under 300 lines
No single function exceeds 40 lines in any extracted file
All existing ApplicationList tests pass
npm test passes all tests
userStories.notes: Second-largest function. Was partially split in US-132 but still oversized.

userStories.title: Split KanbanBoard.jsx (259 lines, longest function 187 lines)
userStories.description: KanbanBoard.jsx is 259 lines with a 187-line main function. Extract the column rendering, card rendering, and drag-drop handlers into separate files (KanbanColumn.jsx, KanbanCard.jsx). Move drag logic to a useKanbanDrag hook.
acceptanceCriteria: KanbanBoard.jsx is under 200 lines
No single function exceeds 40 lines
All KanbanBoard and KanbanBoard.mobile tests pass
npm test passes all tests

userStories.title: Split NewEventForm.jsx (253 lines, longest function 161 lines)
userStories.description: NewEventForm.jsx is 253 lines with a 161-line function. Extract date/time picker fields into a sub-component and move form submission logic to a hook.
acceptanceCriteria: NewEventForm.jsx is under 200 lines
No single function exceeds 40 lines
All calendar-related tests pass
npm test passes all tests

userStories.title: Split CommandPalette.jsx: remove direct api/ import
userStories.description: CommandPalette.jsx (201 lines, 159-line function) imports directly from '../api/applications' on line 11, violating the frontend layer separation rule (components must use hooks, not api/). Create a useCommandPaletteActions hook that wraps the API calls, and split the large rendering function into sub-components.
acceptanceCriteria: CommandPalette.jsx has zero imports from '../api/' — all data access goes through hooks/
CommandPalette.jsx is under 200 lines
No single function exceeds 40 lines
npm test passes all tests
userStories.notes: Layer violation: components must not import from api/ directly.

userStories.title: Fix SettingsReportSection.jsx direct api/ import
userStories.description: SettingsReportSection.jsx imports 'downloadPdfReport' directly from '../api/applications' on line 8. This violates the frontend layer rule. Create or extend an existing hook (e.g., useApplicationExport) to wrap this call.
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsReportSection.jsx has zero imports from '../api/'
PDF download functionality still works (existing tests pass)
npm test passes all tests

userStories.title: Fix FeedbackWidget.jsx direct api/client import
userStories.description: FeedbackWidget.jsx imports { client } from '../api/client' on line 11, bypassing the hooks layer. Create a useFeedback hook or useMutation wrapper so the component never touches the API client directly.
acceptanceCriteria: FeedbackWidget.jsx has zero imports from '../api/'
Feedback submission still works
npm test passes all tests

userStories.title: Fix Dashboard.jsx direct api/ import
userStories.description: Dashboard.jsx (pages/) imports 'exportApplicationsCsv' directly from '../api/applications' on line 23. Pages should use hooks for data access. Move this to a hook.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard.jsx has zero imports from '../api/'
CSV export functionality still works
npm test passes all tests
userStories.notes: Layer violation in pages/ — same rule applies.

userStories.title: Split backend score_fit() (84 lines) in parsing/fit_scorer.py
userStories.description: score_fit() in backend/parsing/fit_scorer.py is 84 lines, more than double the 40-line limit. Extract sub-scoring functions (e.g., _score_skills_match, _score_experience_level, _score_location) and have score_fit() orchestrate them.
acceptanceCriteria: No function in fit_scorer.py exceeds 40 lines
score_fit() returns identical results for the same inputs (behavior unchanged)
All backend tests pass: pytest tests/ -x
Type annotations on all new functions

userStories.title: Split backend list_events() (59 lines) in cal/service.py
userStories.description: list_events() in backend/cal/service.py is 59 lines. Extract the aggregation pipeline builder into a helper function and the result transformation into another.
acceptanceCriteria: No function in cal/service.py exceeds 40 lines
Calendar API behavior unchanged
All backend tests pass: pytest tests/ -x
Type annotations on all new functions

userStories.title: Split backend parse_with_openai() (52 lines) and parse_internship_table() (51 lines)
userStories.description: parsing/openai_client.py parse_with_openai() is 52 lines. jobs/sync.py parse_internship_table() is 51 lines. Split each into smaller helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: No function in openai_client.py or sync.py exceeds 40 lines
All backend tests pass: pytest tests/ -x
Type annotations on all new functions
userStories.notes: Two functions in one story since both are moderate violations.

userStories.title: Split backend create_user() (50 lines), ensure_indexes() (55 lines), build_weekly_digest() (46 lines)
userStories.description: Three backend functions exceed the 40-line limit: auth/service.py create_user() at 50 lines, database.py ensure_indexes() at 55 lines, notifications/digest.py build_weekly_digest() at 46 lines. Split each into smaller focused helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: No function in auth/service.py, database.py, or notifications/digest.py exceeds 40 lines
All backend tests pass: pytest tests/ -x
Type annotations on all new functions

userStories.title: Extension: split popup.js renderSaves() (87 lines) and add error handling
userStories.description: extension/popup/popup.js renderSaves() spans lines 67-153 (87 lines, exceeds 40-line limit). Also, init() on line 216 is called without error handling. Split renderSaves into smaller render helpers (renderSaveItem, renderEmptyState). Wrap init() in a try/catch with console.error and user-visible fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: No function in popup.js exceeds 40 lines
popup.js init() is wrapped in try/catch with console.error and user-visible fallback
npm test in extension/ passes all tests
popup.js total lines stay under 300

userStories.title: Extension: add unknown message type fallback in background.js
userStories.description: background.js message listener (lines 177-210) has no fallback for unknown message types — unrecognized messages are silently dropped. Add a default case that logs the unknown type via console.warn and returns { success: false, error: 'Unknown message type' }. Also split fetchWithAuth() (43 lines) to stay under the limit.
acceptanceCriteria: background.js message listener has a default/else branch for unknown message types that returns an error response
fetchWithAuth() in background.js is under 40 lines
npm test in extension/ passes all tests

userStories.title: Split remaining oversized frontend components: ApplicationRowActions, PrepSection, CalendarGrid, FeedbackWidget, SettingsResumeSection, CsvImportModal
userStories.description: Six components have functions exceeding 40 lines: ApplicationRowActions.jsx (276 lines, 131-line fn), PrepSection.jsx (245 lines, 171-line fn), CalendarGrid.jsx (233 lines, function sizes TBD), FeedbackWidget.jsx (214 lines), SettingsResumeSection.jsx (204 lines, 181-line fn), CsvImportModal.jsx (154-line fn). Extract sub-components and hooks to bring all functions under 40 lines.
acceptanceCriteria: No function in any of the six files exceeds 40 lines
All files stay under 300 lines
All existing tests pass — npm test shows 0 failures
No new test files needed unless existing ones break
